strategy: Hit with Ice - he takes +50% from it and resists 80% of Fire; never attack into his Fire resist.
Handle the Rat Illusionists' -90% Tower Shields: they reshield Knuckles and Estrakir every turn until a boss dies, so either kill both Rats first or plan an AoE that clears everything in one round.
Set traps with all-enemy spells like Windstorm or Mass Fire Prism - he Cleanse Wards single traps and shields but cannot remove AoE traps.
Do not heal - Knuckles answers any heal with a 750 Rebirth; use absorbs or resist instead.
Clear Knuckles before landing a big single hit on Estrakir, or attacking Estrakir first gives him a free out-of-turn Fire Dragon.
Keep a Global on the field to stop his 770 Fire Power Nova, and burst fast once minions fall since he starts Scarecrow-draining every other turn.
cheatNotes: Attacking or defeating Estrakir while Knuckles McCloud is still up makes Knuckles hand him a Helping Hands and Estrakir fire a Fire Dragon out of turn. Clear Knuckles first, or AoE both at once.
His own Meteor Strike also sets off that out-of-turn Fire Dragon.
He may throw a Fire Dragon at you even on rounds you did not hit him, so keep some resist or a shield up.
Morganthe's Requiem is a safe hit - it does not set off the Helping Hands or Fire Dragon cheat.
He Cleanse Wards off any Shield placed on him or his minions, so single shields on him are wasted.
Only the first trap of a tri-trap spell gets removed, so the other two stick.
All-enemy trap spells like Windstorm or Mass Fire Prism are NOT cleansed - use these to keep traps on him.
Pet-cast spells do not trigger the cleanse, though he may still strip the traps on a later turn.
Linked secondary effects (Brimstone Revenant, Keeper of the Flame) get removed too.
If no global is on the field he casts a Fire Power Nova for 770 to the team every three turns, so keeping a global up suppresses it.
Once his minions are down he starts casting Scarecrow (600 drain) every other turn, so finish him quickly after.
The Rat Illusionists put -90% Tower Shields on Knuckles and Estrakir on turn one and instantly replace any that break.
Each Rat picks one boss to shield; if only one Rat is left it shields Knuckles before Estrakir.
Defeating Estrakir or Knuckles ends the Rat shielding loop.
If any wizard heals, Knuckles counter-casts a 750 Rebirth heal, so avoid healing spells.
Pet heals do not set off Knuckles' counter-heal.
